scope: Primary papers and foundational cross-domain concepts that directly shaped FOCUS-Fabric 2026.07.

entries.title: CompressKV: Semantic-Retrieval-Guided KV-Cache Compression for Resource-Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
entries.insight: Semantic retrieval heads and non-uniform layer budgets matter.
entries.adoption: Per-head/per-page codec selection; global layer budget remains a registered hypothesis.
entries.caveat: Author-reported benchmark results are not reproduced here.

entries.title: PolyKV: Heterogeneous Retention and Allocation for KV Cache Compression
entries.insight: Different layers benefit from different policies and budgets.
entries.adoption: FOCUS-Fabric generalizes heterogeneity to representation families at page/head granularity.
entries.caveat: No direct reproduction in this CPU release.

entries.title: Understanding the Physics of Key-Value Cache Compression for LLMs through Attention Dynamics
entries.insight: Retention, semantic accessibility, and utilization differ; extreme compression can create a routing safety cliff.
entries.adoption: Exact verifier, routing/log-mass metrics, distribution-shift benchmark, and no universal compression claim.
entries.caveat: The reported cliff is model/task dependent.

entries.title: Information-Aware KV Cache Compression for Long Reasoning
entries.insight: Predictive uncertainty and forward influence complement attention salience.
entries.adoption: Hybrid residual scoring includes forward-impact proxies; future global controller hypothesis uses uncertainty budgets.
entries.caveat: The public proxy is simpler than InfoKV's full learned setting.

entries.title: Fast KV Compaction via Attention Matching
entries.insight: Compact state should preserve attention outputs and attention mass, not only tokens.
entries.adoption: Every codec predicts both output and log-normalizer; selection and claims report both.
entries.caveat: FOCUS-Fabric does not implement the paper's complete optimization family.

entries.title: Nectar: Neural Estimation of Cached-Token Attention via Regression
entries.insight: Fixed-context attention is a query-to-output/log-normalizer function.
entries.adoption: FOCUS-Native operator retained as one analytic local function codec.
entries.caveat: Nectar trains neural regressors; this release uses analytic/local and moment-based candidates.

entries.title: The Residual Stream Is All You Need: On the Redundancy of the KV Cache in Transformer Inference
entries.insight: Residual streams can be an exact source for regenerating K/V in conventional decoder layers.
entries.adoption: Architecture reserves an exact-regeneration backend and refuses to conflate active compression with total information deletion.
entries.caveat: Residual regeneration was not integrated or benchmarked here.

entries.title: Do Language Models Need Sleep? Offline Recurrence for Improved Online Inference
entries.insight: Move expensive consolidation into periodic offline phases.
entries.adoption: Compaction is separated from hot decode; sleep consolidation is a preregistered autonomous hypothesis.
entries.caveat: No fast-weight sleep training was run in this environment.

entries.title: Titans: Learning to Memorize at Test Time
entries.insight: Attention and persistent learned memory can be complementary short- and long-term systems.
entries.adoption: Native training exposes compressed-prefix losses while retaining exact local attention.
entries.caveat: FOCUS-Fabric is not a Titans reproduction.

entries.title: ATLAS: Learning to Optimally Memorize the Context at Test Time
entries.insight: Memory updates can optimize over current and past tokens instead of one-step online updates.
entries.adoption: Multi-query compilation and planned sleep-time optimization rather than irreversible one-token eviction.
entries.caveat: The release has no ATLAS-scale training evidence.

entries.title: MesaNet: Sequence Modeling by Locally Optimal Test-Time Training
entries.insight: Solving an in-context objective more accurately can trade inference FLOPs for memory quality.
entries.adoption: Rate–distortion objective records compute as a first-class cost; future candidates may use iterative solvers.
entries.caveat: No conjugate-gradient memory layer is implemented.

entries.title: Parallel Causal Associative Fields: Gated Sparse Memory for Long-Context Language Modeling
entries.insight: Bounded sparse associative retrieval can complement a parametric local model.
entries.adoption: Supports the decision to keep exact residual/sparse retrieval as a separate family rather than forcing all history into one recurrent state.
entries.caveat: No hash-bucket successor cache is implemented.

entries.title: Agentic Context Engineering: Evolving Contexts for Self-Improving Language Models
entries.insight: Structured incremental context updates resist brevity bias and context collapse.
entries.adoption: Typed append-only ledger, incremental capsules, and versioned experiment playbooks.
entries.caveat: Agent benchmark gains reported by ACE are not reproduced here.

entries.title: Memory in the Age of AI Agents
entries.insight: Token, parametric, and latent forms serve factual, experiential, and working functions with distinct dynamics and trust risks.
entries.adoption: Numerical KV and semantic governance memory are explicitly separated.
entries.caveat: Taxonomy is broader than this implementation.

entries.title: LifeBench: A Benchmark for Long-Horizon Multi-Source Memory
entries.insight: Memory evaluation must cover procedural/non-declarative patterns and multi-source temporal integration.
entries.adoption: Added to the mandatory external evaluation matrix.
entries.caveat: Not executed here.

entries.title: RULER: What's the Real Context Size of Your Long-Context Language Models?
entries.insight: Configurable length and tasks beyond literal needle retrieval expose effective context limits.
entries.adoption: Official-data runner supports RULER prediction/telemetry export.
entries.caveat: Official scorer has not been run here.

entries.title: LongBench v2: Towards Deeper Understanding and Reasoning on Realistic Long-context Multitasks
entries.insight: Realistic long documents and reasoning complement synthetic cache tests.
entries.adoption: Required release-stage benchmark.
entries.caveat: Not executed here.

entries.title: BABILong: Testing the Limits of LLMs with Long Context Reasoning-in-a-Haystack
entries.insight: Long irrelevant text plus multi-fact reasoning tests more than retrieval.
entries.adoption: Official-data runner supports BABILong records.
entries.caveat: Not executed here.

entries.title: Distribution-Free Predictive Inference for Regression
entries.insight: Held-out nonconformity scores provide finite-sample marginal coverage under exchangeability.
entries.adoption: Per-codec split-conformal error/proxy calibration.
entries.caveat: Not a conditional or adversarial guarantee; shift failure is measured explicitly.

entries.title: Probability Inequalities for Sums of Bounded Random Variables
entries.insight: Finite-window bounded observations admit conservative concentration intervals.
entries.adoption: DriftSentinel lower confidence bound for miscoverage audits.
entries.caveat: Independence assumptions are approximate in sequential decoding.

entries.title: The Log-Structured Merge-Tree (LSM-Tree)
entries.insight: Tiered immutable runs and background merging separate write path from consolidation.
entries.adoption: Binary-counter page hierarchy and immutable exact source-of-truth archives.
entries.caveat: The current implementation lacks crash-consistent manifests and concurrency control.

entries.title: Fast Inference from Transformers via Speculative Decoding
entries.insight: A cheap drafter can be corrected by a target model without changing the target distribution.
entries.adoption: Backend-neutral exact greedy block verifier for compressed-memory drafts.
entries.caveat: Current proof/path is greedy-only and not optimized.

entries.title: Event Sourcing
entries.insight: An append-only event log preserves reconstructability and audit history.
entries.adoption: TrajectoryLedger stores immutable typed records and derives compact active views.
entries.caveat: A local hash chain is not a trusted timestamp or digital signature.
